entities.name: Hydrogen Principle
entities.context: Framework for achieving radical clarity by identifying the most fundamental, foundational element in any system—stripping away secondary noise to focus on what truly drives value

entities.name: Pareto Principle
entities.context: The principle that a minority of inputs drive the majority of outputs; referenced as theoretical foundation for the Hydrogen concept

entities.name: Careerspan
entities.context: V's company; context for applying the Hydrogen Principle to identify a singular foundational metric or behavior

relationships.context: Hydrogen Principle is described as taking the Pareto Principle to its logical extreme—from 80/20 to a singular foundational element
The principle should be applied to identify Careerspan's foundational element, with all other initiatives deprioritized accordingly
